description_long: This is a translucent plastic garbage bag filled with a light blue material, giving it a semi-opaque appearance. The bag is gathered and tightly secured at the top with a visible knot, creating a wrinkled and cinched closure. The body of the bag is slightly bulging, indicating it is moderately full, and the contents press against the thin plastic, creating subtle surface tension and creases. The bag has a soft, flexible structure, with the lower portion spreading out slightly to form a stable base. No printed labels, logos, or text are visible on the exterior, and the bag appears clean and intact. The bag is shown isolated, as if placed on a flat surface or suspended in midair.
description: A translucent plastic garbage bag, moderately full with a light blue material, cinched at the top with a knot and showing subtle bulges and creases.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, slightly bulging face of the bag with the knot and gathered plastic clearly visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the bag, emphasizing the cinched closure and the vertical stretch of the plastic.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the bag's fullness and the even distribution of the contents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the vertical lines of tension in the plastic.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: moderately full with visible bulging and surface tension
attribute_placement_or_location: isolated, as if placed on a flat surface or suspended
